bench_press.name: Bench Press
bench_press.description: Lying on a bench, push the bar up from your chest.

incline_bench_press.name: Incline Bench Press
incline_bench_press.description: Lying on an incline bench, push the bar or dumbbells up from your chest.

dumbbell_bench_press.name: Dumbbell Bench Press
dumbbell_bench_press.description: Lying on a flat bench, press dumbbells upward from your chest.

incline_dumbbell_press.name: Incline Dumbbell Press
incline_dumbbell_press.description: Lying on an incline bench, press dumbbells upward from your chest.

pec_fly.name: Pec Fly
pec_fly.description: Lying on a bench, open your arms with dumbbells and bring them back together above your chest.

cable_crossover.name: Cable Crossover
cable_crossover.description: Standing between two cables, bring your hands together in front of your chest with slightly bent arms.

dips_chest.name: Chest Dips
dips_chest.description: Support your body on parallel bars and lower your torso, then push back up to target the chest.

push_up.name: Push-up
push_up.description: From a plank position, lower your chest to the ground and push back up.

machine_chest_press.name: Machine Chest Press
machine_chest_press.description: Sit on the machine and push the handles forward to work the chest.

pull_up.name: Pull-up
pull_up.description: Hanging from a bar, pull your body upward.

barbell_curl.name: Barbell Curl
barbell_curl.description: Hold a barbell with an underhand grip and curl it up towards your chest.

preacher_curl.name: Preacher Curl
preacher_curl.description: Rest your arms on a preacher bench and curl the bar or dumbbell upward.

cable_biceps_hammer.name: Cable Hammer Curl
cable_biceps_hammer.description: Using a rope on the low pulley, curl with a hammer grip.

cable_biceps_neutral.name: Cable Neutral Curl
cable_biceps_neutral.description: Using a straight bar or handle on the low pulley, curl with a neutral grip.

concentration_curl_hammer.name: Concentration Hammer Curl
concentration_curl_hammer.description: Seated with elbow resting on the thigh, curl the dumbbell with a hammer grip.

concentration_curl_neutral.name: Concentration Neutral Curl
concentration_curl_neutral.description: Seated with elbow resting on the thigh, curl the dumbbell with a neutral grip.

hammer_curl.name: Hammer Curl
hammer_curl.description: Hold dumbbells with a neutral grip and curl them upward.

dumbbell_curl.name: Dumbbell Curl
dumbbell_curl.description: Hold dumbbells with an underhand grip and curl them towards your shoulders.

incline_dumbbell_curl.name: Incline Dumbbell Curl
incline_dumbbell_curl.description: Sitting on an incline bench, curl dumbbells upward with an underhand grip.

incline_hammer_curl.name: Incline Hammer Curl
incline_hammer_curl.description: Sitting on an incline bench, curl dumbbells upward with a hammer grip.
